description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two stages: build and deploy, and define global variables AWS_REGION, BUCKET_NAME and OUTPUT_FOLDER. In the build stage add a build job (runs on a lv2017 runner) that executes `apply-vipm "Windows Applications\Application\vipm-pkgs.deps"` and `MGISlnExp build "Windows Applications\Windows Applications.lvsln" Release -gitversion Major.Minor.Patch.CommitsSinceVersionSource`, stores the "${OUTPUT_FOLDER}" directory as an artifact that expires in 1 week, and is excluded from tag pipelines. In the deploy stage add a deploy job (lv2017 runner) that copies any existing Packages and Packages.stamps from S3 to "${OUTPUT_FOLDER}", runs the NI Package Manager `"C:/Program Files/National Instruments/NI Package Manager/nipkg.exe" feed-create -a "${OUTPUT_FOLDER}"`, then uploads the whole "${OUTPUT_FOLDER}" back to S3 with public‑read ACL, defines an environment named "${CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG}" with a stop URL and links to a clean_s3 job. Also add a clean_s3 manual job (python:latest image) that installs awscli and removes the S3 folder for the current ref, runs only on manual trigger and when not a tag, and is set as the on_stop action for the deploy environment. All jobs inherit GIT_STRATEGY none from a hidden template and skip execution on tag pipelines.
